Records.authors: Borowka, S., Heinrich, G., Jahn, S., Jones, S.P., Kerner, M., Schlenk, J., Zirke, T.
Records.description: Two-loop vertex integral N3 entering the Zbb form factor (Fleischer:1998nb, Dubovyk:2016zok), with one massive propagator (mass m_Z) and the on-shell condition s = p3^2 = m_Z^2. The kinematics has no Euclidean region: the second Symanzik polynomial F vanishes on a hyperplane in Feynman parameter space, producing endpoint singularities at x_i=1 in addition to those at the origin. pySecDec uses a dedicated splitting procedure (avoiding the symmetric point x_i=0.5) to remap these into origin singularities. Numerical results through eps^0 are reported in Tab. N3.
